welcome.title: Welcome to Reeeeecall!
welcome.description: The smartest way to study with flashcards. Create decks, add cards, and let our spaced repetition algorithm optimize your learning.

createDeck.title: Create Your First Deck
createDeck.description: A deck is a collection of flashcards on a topic. Create one for any subject you want to study.

cardTemplate.title: Choose a Card Template
cardTemplate.description: Templates define how your cards look. Use the default front/back template, or choose specialized ones for languages, exams, and more.

addCards.title: Add Cards to Your Deck
addCards.description: Add cards manually, import from CSV, or use AI to generate cards automatically from any topic.

firstStudy.title: Start Studying!
firstStudy.description: Choose your study mode: SRS (spaced repetition) for long-term memory, or random/sequential for quick review. Rate each card to track your progress.

exploreMarket.title: Explore the Marketplace
exploreMarket.description: Discover thousands of shared decks created by other users. Find study materials for any subject and start learning instantly.
